data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Ensures even distribution of user traffic across servers.
data.technical_spec: Implements algorithms such as round-robin or IP-hash.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decomposes the application into smaller, independent services.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Docker containers and Kubernetes for orchestration.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Serves as the entry point for client requests.
data.technical_spec: Employs rate limiting and authentication protocols.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Splits database into smaller, distributed segments.
data.technical_spec: Uses Hash Sharding to distribute user data.

data.title: Asynchronous Messaging
data.technical_spec: Uses messaging queues like RabbitMQ or Kafka.
